title: Tales Across The Multiverse
description: This Addon For Palladium Adds Power Rangers, Doctor Fate, & More! (to come)
body:
Tales Across The Multiverse. Its a addonpack full of things from different franchises, such as Space Marines, Power Rangers, Dr Fate, & More to come.

This Addonpack Specifically Adds Multiple Power Ranger Teams, Suits for you to Craft & Wear, Dr Fate's Helmet, Legion Flight Ring, Tantu Totem, Force-field Belt, & Soon To Come Kaiju And Space Marines

I belive you should try out my addon because it adds unique, new exciting things to try out and experiment.

The Power Rangers Are Found Via A Structure that Spawns In Badlands And Will Contain A Morpher And One Power Coin.
The Dragonzord Ranger (Green One) Is Found Via A Structure In The Nether.

The Doctor Fate Helmet is Found Via A Chance of Looting it In a Desert Temple.

**Word of Caution is This Pack May Crash Your Modpack, And If so The Only Way I Can Know Is if You Submit A Bug Report On The Discord.**
